overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through the Badlands desert highway during golden hour. The player overtakes a truck and navigates winding roads past wind turbines, rocky formations, and industrial structures.

events.description: motorcycle accelerates to overtake the cargo truck ahead
successfully passes the truck and merges back into the lane

agents.ego_description: riding a motorcycle and overtaking a slow-moving cargo truck on the desert highway

notable_agents.action: cargo truck driving slowly ahead before being overtaken

entered.detail: large industrial cargo truck with red taillights driving ahead on the highway
large rusted wind turbine with multiple blades silhouetted against the sky
large desert rock outcropping visible in the distance
red and white striped metal highway barrier

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person motorcycle view following a cargo truck on a desert highway. The player accelerates and overtakes the truck around the 8-second mark. Large wind turbines dot the landscape on both sides, and rocky formations appear in the distance as the road curves gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road with rock outcroppings

events.description: motorcycle slows down significantly to navigate a sharp curve
road straightens and industrial buildings become visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: navigating winding curves through rocky terrain, slowing down for turns then accelerating

entered.detail: desert yucca tree visible alongside the road
large industrial yellow pipeline running parallel to the highway

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle navigates a winding section of highway through rocky desert terrain. The rider slows down for sharp curves, with rock formations flanking both sides of the road. Industrial structures and yellow pipelines begin to appear in the distance as the road straightens toward the end of the segment.

events.description: motorcycle accelerates to high speed on the straightaway

agents.ego_description: accelerating along a straight stretch of highway, passing industrial infrastructure

entered.detail: low-rise industrial structure with metal roofing and piping
large weathered advertising billboard with faded graphics
tall electrical transmission tower with multiple crossbars

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle speeds along a straight desert highway, passing yellow industrial pipelines and approaching a small settlement. Billboards and electrical infrastructure become prominent, while the rocky terrain gives way to flatter industrial ground. The sun casts long shadows across the asphalt.

events.description: passing multiple large billboards and entering more developed industrial zone

agents.ego_description: cruising through industrial area, weaving slightly to avoid debris on the road

entered.detail: overhead electrical cables stretching across the highway
damaged and rusted wind turbine with broken blades close to the road

segments.scene_description: The highway continues through a more industrialized section of the Badlands, with large billboards lining both sides of the road. Power lines and electrical towers run parallel to the route, and rusted wind turbines stand close to the pavement. The road surface shows signs of wear with scattered debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with distant mountain range

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed along the open highway toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: distant mountain ridge silhouetted against the golden hour sky
highway sign visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final stretch shows the motorcycle driving toward a distant mountain range as the industrial area recedes behind. The highway stretches straight ahead with guardrails on both sides, and the warm golden light of dusk illuminates the desert landscape. Power lines continue to run alongside the road into the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person motorcycle journey that transitions from an open desert highway into a dense industrial corridor before opening up toward a distant mountain range. It begins by accelerating to overtake a cargo truck amidst a landscape of towering wind turbines and distant rocky formations. As the road curves through sharp bends flanked by steep rocks, the scenery shifts toward an industrial zone marked by yellow pipelines and electrical infrastructure. The camera then speeds along a straight stretch of worn asphalt lined with large billboards and rusted turbines, where the terrain flattens and long shadows stretch across the road. Finally, the industrial structures recede as the highway extends toward a far-off mountain range under the warm, golden light of dusk.
